entries.blurb: For any upgraded ('+') card present in the state, its resolved upgrade form applies.
Ironclad deck contains [[cards/Barricade]] and [[cards/Body Slam]] ([[cards/Entrench]] strongly amplifies it). Especially relevant approaching a long boss fight or the Heart.
Defect deck runs [[cards/Biased Cognition]] and has a source of [[buffs/Artifact]] (notably [[cards/Core Surge]]).
You hold [[relics/Brimstone]] and could path into or are fighting [[enemies/Book of Stabbing]] (or other multi-hit, self-scaling enemies).
Silent poison deck has [[cards/Catalyst]] and a target already carrying meaningful Poison ([[cards/Bouncing Flask]] and [[cards/Burst]] amplify it).
Ironclad deck contains [[cards/Corruption]] and you hold [[relics/Dead Branch]] — or you are offered one while you have the other.
Defect orb deck channels Lightning and has or is offered [[cards/Electrodynamics]], especially when multi-enemy fights are common on the path ahead.
You have a Watcher stance-swapping loop (or any frequent stance changes) and face damage dealt per card played — [[buffs/Beat of Death]] on the [[bosses/Corrupt Heart]], or Thorns enemies.
Watcher deck is thin and contains [[cards/Rushdown]] plus a cheap card that enters [[buffs/Wrath]] and one that enters [[buffs/Calm]] (costing about 2 energy combined).
Ironclad deck has both [[relics/Snecko Eye]] and [[cards/Corruption]] — or you are choosing whether to take one with the other already in the deck.
You are offered [[relics/Snecko Eye]] while holding [[relics/Runic Pyramid]], or the reverse.
